title: laburnum laburnum
intro: Laburnum laburnum, also known as golden chain tree, is a flowering plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of laburnum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antipyretic and diuretic. Laburnum is traditionally prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues.
